title: SpartanWeapons
description: Sort of fabric version of Spartan Weaponry, not all the same weapons, but some additional customization and compat with Better Combat.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49606c4fc9e4ca9f4f32db424c501777dbbbeb61.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/SpartanWeapons/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/SpartanWeapons/issues)


Sort of a fabric version of Spartan Weaponry (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-weaponry), with a few added features. Spartan Weapons is a mod that adds various melee weapons to Minecraft so you don't have to run the same old diamond sword for the 1,398,617th time. Compatibility with better combat allows dual wielding and 2 handed weapons and depending on the type of wood you use the texture of your weapon's handle can be whatever you like for a little added customization. Balancing is likely not final, some testing required. Message me on discord for a server invite for feedback channels, feel free to invite friends: pois1x

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page. Better Combat is Optional: https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat
